chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1952 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case: 1. For orders on Misc. No.9517/2020 (Urgency): 2. For order on office objections No.1,18 & 27: 3. For orders on Misc. No.9518/2020 (Exemption): 4. For orders on Misc. No.9519/2020 (Stay): 5. For hearing of main case: 20.03.2020: Syeda Anjum Al Sehar Sehrish petitioner present in person. ----------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Petitioner undertakes to comply with the office objections before the next date of hearing. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. Through this petition, the petitioner has prayed that the official respondents be directed not to take over the possession of the subject official accommodation bearing Flat No.2, Block-11 F-A, F.C Area, Karachi. Petitioner Mst. Syeda Anjum Al Sehar Sehrish, who is present in person, submits that she is the real daughter of the allottee, who has passed away. The official accommodation in question has been allotted to respondent No.4 Salahuddin, Lance Naik, Pakistan Coast Guard Karachi; she further states that she is unmarried daughter of the deceased allottee and is suffering from paralysis, therefore, prays that she may be allowed to stay in the subject quarter on payment of applicable rent. Subject to maintainability of the instant petition, Issue notice to the respondents as well as to learned DAG with direction to file comments before the next date of hearing. To come up on 09.04.2020.
